summary: Restore stdin-backed cookie import so operators can paste a raw Cookie header directly into the CLI.
reason: This worktree still advertised `cookie set --stdin` in the README but did not implement the flag, which became an immediate blocker once live verification needed a fresh website session again.
validated_outcome: The CLI accepts `pbpaste | idealista-pp-cli cookie set --stdin`, strips a leading `Cookie: ` prefix, and the internal CLI/client/MCP test set passes.
